title: Addressing Unbalanced Datasets in Machine Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating the problem of unbalanced datasets and the common strategies to mitigate its effects on model performance.
relationships: An unbalanced dataset leads a model to be biased towards the majority class, resulting in poor performance. Resampling and algorithmic techniques are applied to rebalance the data or its importance. These improved inputs are then used to train a new model, which must be evaluated with appropriate metrics to ensure it performs well on all classes.
